briefdescription.para: Write to HLS IP register at specified offset.
Read from HLS IP register at specified offset.
Interrupt handler for Warp Filter frame done.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when the Warp Filter completes processing a frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback reference

briefdescription.para: Callback function for Warp Initializer interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when the Warp Initializer completes remap vector generation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback reference

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes and starts the AXI timer counter for measuring execution time.
Stop timer and read counter values.
This function performs a hardware reset of the Warp Initializer IP by toggling the GPIO reset signal.

None
None This function stops the AXI timer counter and reads the counter values for performance measurement.
This function performs a hardware reset of the Warp Filter IP by toggling the GPIO reset signal.

briefdescription.para: Main function for Warp example application.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the Warp Initializer and Warp Filter IPs, configures interrupts, generates remap vectors, and processes a frame through the warp pipeline.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE or error code
